title: the vr experience
description: a modpack trying to make vr minecraft easy to install and play
body: This modpack allows you to easily hop in virtual reality in minecraft without the need to setup mods etc.If you want to use this modpack you need a vr headset and if you are using a oculus/meta quest headset you need to install and launch the steam link app on the store of the quest then launch the modpack and you should be put inside of VR
